snippet.title: аӘӯаӘҫаӘңаӘӘаӘ®аӘҫаӘӮ аӘёаӘ—аӘҫаӘөаӘҫаӘҰ аӘҡаӘҫаӘІа«Ү аӘӣа«Ү? аӘ¶а«ҒаӘӮ аӘ•аӘ№а«Ү аӘӣа«Ү аӘӘа«ҖаӘҸаӘ® аӘ®а«ӢаӘҰа«ҖаӘЁаӘҫ аӘӯаӘҫаӘҲ аӘӘа«ҚаӘ°аӘ№а«ҚаӘІаӘҫаӘҰ аӘ®а«ӢаӘҰа«Җ? BBC Exclusive
snippet.description:
#gujarat #localbodyelection #narendramodi 

аӘ—а«ҒаӘңаӘ°аӘҫаӘӨаӘ®аӘҫаӘӮ аӘёа«ҚаӘҘаӘҫаӘЁаӘҝаӘ• аӘёа«ҚаӘөаӘ°аӘҫаӘңаӘЁа«Җ аӘҡа«ӮаӘӮаӘҹаӘЈа«ҖаӘЁа«Ү аӘІаӘҲаӘЁа«Ү аӘӨаӘ®аӘҫаӘ® аӘӘаӘ•а«ҚаӘ·а«ӢаӘҸ аӘӨа«ҲаӘҜаӘҫаӘ°а«Җ аӘ¶аӘ°а«Ӯ аӘ•аӘ°а«Җ аӘҰа«ҖаӘ§а«Җ аӘӣа«Ү. 

аӘЁаӘ°а«ҮаӘЁа«ҚаӘҰа«ҚаӘ° аӘ®а«ӢаӘҰа«ҖаӘЁаӘҫ аӘӯаӘҫаӘҲ аӘӘа«ҚаӘ°аӘ№а«ҚаӘІаӘҫаӘҰ аӘ®а«ӢаӘҰа«ҖаӘЁаӘҫ аӘӘа«ҒаӘӨа«ҚаӘ°а«Җ аӘёа«ӢаӘЁаӘІ аӘ®а«ӢаӘҰа«Җ аӘҶ аӘҡа«ӮаӘӮаӘҹаӘЈа«ҖаӘ®аӘҫаӘӮ аӘүаӘ®а«ҮаӘҰаӘөаӘҫаӘ°а«Җ аӘЁа«ӢаӘӮаӘ§аӘҫаӘөа«Җ аӘ°аӘ№а«ҚаӘҜаӘҫ аӘӣа«Ү. 

аӘ¬а«ҖаӘ¬а«ҖаӘёа«Җ аӘёаӘӮаӘөаӘҫаӘҰаӘҰаӘҫаӘӨаӘҫ аӘӨа«ҮаӘңаӘё аӘөа«ҲаӘҰа«ҚаӘҜаӘҸ аӘӘа«ҚаӘ°аӘ№а«ҚаӘІаӘҫаӘҰаӘӯаӘҫаӘҲ аӘёаӘҫаӘҘа«Ү аӘөаӘҫаӘӨ аӘ•аӘ°а«Җ. 

аӘөа«ҖаӘЎаӘҝаӘҜа«Ӣ : аӘүаӘӨа«ҚаӘёаӘө аӘ—аӘңа«ҚаӘңаӘ° 

аӘӨаӘ®а«Ү аӘ…аӘ®аӘҫаӘ°а«Җ аӘёаӘҫаӘҘа«Ү аӘңа«ӢаӘЎаӘҫаӘҲ аӘ¶аӘ•а«Ӣ аӘӣа«Ӣ :

snippet.title: Uppena Movie Trailer Announcement | Panja Vaisshnav Tej | Krithi Shetty | Vijay Sethupathi | Buchi
snippet.description:
Uppena Movie Trailer Announcement on Mythri Movie Makers. #Uppena is a latest Telugu movie ft. Panja Vaisshnav Tej, Vijay Sethupathi, Krithi Shetty. Written & Directed by Buchi Babu Sana. Music by DSP / Devi Sri Prasad. Presented by Sukumar, Produced by Naveen Yerneni, Y Ravi Shankar under Mythri Movie Makers & Sukumar Writings banners.

 Uppena is all set for a Grand Release on February 12th.


#UppenaTrailer #PanjaVaisshnavTej #VijaySethupathi #KrithiShetty #BuchiBabuSana #DSP 

Movie Details:
Cast: Panja Vaisshnav Tej, Vijay Sethupathi, Krithi Shetty
Written & Directed by: Buchi Babu Sana
Cinematography: Shamdat Sainudeen
Music director: Devi Sri Prasad
Editor: Naveen Nooli
Art Director: Mounika Ramakrishna
Fights: Venkat
Choreogrpahy : Brinda, Prem Rakshit
VFX Supervisor: Yugandhar
Executive Producers: Anil Y, Ashok B
CEO: Cherry
Presented by Sukumar
Producers: Naveen Yerneni, Y Ravi Shankar
Banners: Mythri Movie Makers, Sukumar Writings

snippet.title: Ghost Scenario | Promo Video | Jump Cuts 2.0 | Hari & Naresh
snippet.description:
Have you had a savage ghost moment? Jump Cuts presents a promo video of вҖңGhost Scenario.вҖқ 

That creepy 2 am call from Ramesh has raised too many questions in his friendвҖҷs mind. He goes to the terrace to meet Ramesh, but alas! ThereвҖҷs no one. Later, he gets a call from RameshвҖҷs mother that Ramesh is dead.

If Ramesh is dead, who was calling? Find out in вҖңGhost Scenario.вҖқ Stay tuned to Jump Cuts for the full video.

#Ghostscenario #Promo #Jumpcuts

snippet.title: аӨ№аҘҖ аӨҸаӨ• аӨ—аҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨөаҘҖ аӨ¬аӨЁаӨөаҘҒаӨЁ аӨ аҘҮаӨөаӨҫ аӨҶаӨЈаӨҝ аӨ№аӨөаӨӮ аӨӨаҘҮаӨөаҘҚаӨ№аӨҫ аӨ№аҘүаӨҹаҘҮаӨІаӨёаӨҫаӨ°аӨ–аҘҖ аӨ•аҘӢаӨЈаӨӨаҘҖаӨ№аҘҖ аӨЎаӨҝаӨ¶ аӨ«аӨ•аҘҚаӨӨ 10 аӨ®аӨҝаӨЁаӨҝаӨҹаӨҫаӨӨ аӨ¬аӨЁаӨөаӨҫ/All purpose gravy
snippet.description:
In this video I will share recipe of restaurant style all purpose gravy, using this gravy you can make many dishes within 10-15 mins and tastes awesome.

аӨҜаӨҫ аӨөаӨҝаӨЎаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢ аӨ®аӨ§аҘҚаӨҜаҘҮ аӨҶаӨӘаӨЈ аӨӘаӨҫаӨ№аӨЈаӨҫаӨ° аӨҶаӨ№аҘӢаӨӨ аӨ№аҘүаӨҹаҘҮаӨІ аӨ®аӨ§аҘҚаӨҜаҘҮ аӨөаӨҫаӨӘаӨ°аӨІаҘҖ аӨңаӨҫаӨЈаӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ—аҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨөаҘҖ аӨңаҘҖ аӨөаӨҫаӨӘаӨ°аҘӮаӨЁ аӨ¬аӨ°аҘҚвҖҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨҡ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨ•аӨҫаӨ°аӨҡаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫ аӨЎаӨҝаӨ¶ аӨҶаӨӘаӨЈ 10-15 аӨ®аӨҝаӨЁаӨҝаӨҹаӨҫаӨӨ аӨ¬аӨЁаӨөаҘӮ аӨ¶аӨ•аӨӨаҘӢ.. 

Ingredients / аӨёаӨҫаӨ№аӨҝаӨӨаҘҚаӨҜ ( 4 restaurant style dishes / 4 аӨЎаӨҝаӨ¶ аӨёаӨҫаӨ аҘҖ) 

Tomato / аӨҹаҘӢаӨ®аҘ…аӨҹаҘӢ 500gms 
Onion / аӨ•аӨҫаӨӮаӨҰаҘҮ 500gms 
Ginger / аӨҶаӨІаҘҮ 50gms
Garlic / аӨІаӨёаҘҒаӨЈ 50gms
Pumpkin seeds / аӨ®аӨ—аӨң аӨ¬аҘҖ 50gms
Cadhew / аӨ•аӨҫаӨңаҘӮ 25-30
Oil / аӨӨаҘҮаӨІ 6-7 tbsp
Bay leaf / аӨӨаӨ®аӨҫаӨІаӨӘаӨӨаҘҚаӨ° 4-5
Cinnamon / аӨҰаӨҫаӨІаӨҡаӨҝаӨЁаҘҖ 2 inch
Black cardamom / аӨ®аӨёаӨҫаӨІаӨҫ аӨөаҘҮаӨІаӨҡаҘҖ 1
Green cardamom / аӨ№аӨҝаӨ°аӨөаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫ аӨөаҘҮаӨІаӨҡаҘҖ 6-7
Cloves / аӨІаӨөаӨӮаӨ—аӨҫ 7-8
Cumin seeds / аӨңаҘҖаӨ°аҘҮ 1 tbsp
Salt / аӨ®аҘҖаӨ  
Corriender powder / аӨ§аӨЈаҘҮ аӨӘаҘӮаӨЎ 2 tsp
Sugar / аӨёаӨҫаӨ–аӨ° 2 tsp
Red chilly powder / аӨІаӨҫаӨІ аӨ®аӨҝаӨ°аӨҡаҘҖ аӨӘаӨҫаӨөаӨЎаӨ° 1&1/2 tsp
Turmeric / аӨ№аӨіаӨҰ 1 tsp

#allpurposegravy
#hotelsarkhigravy
#аӨ—аҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨөаҘҖаӨҸаӨ•аӨёаӨ¬аҘҚаӨңаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаӨӮаӨ…аӨЁаҘҮаӨ•
#аӨ—аҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨөаҘҖаӨҸаӨ•аӨӯаӨҫаӨңаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ…аӨЁаҘҮаӨ•

snippet.title: аҙөаҙҫаҙ·аҙҝаҙӮаҙ—аөҚ аҙ®аөҶаҙ·аөҖаҙЁаҙҝаөҪ аҙ…аҙІаҙ•аөҚаҙ•аҙҝаҙҜ аҙөаҙёаөҚаҙӨаөҚаҙ°аҙҷаөҚаҙҷаөҫ аҙүаҙӘаҙҜаөӢаҙ—аҙҝаҙ•аөҚаҙ•аөҒаҙЁаөҚаҙЁаҙөаөј аҙҲ аҙ°аөӢаҙ—аҙҷаөҚаҙҷаөҫ аҙӘаҙҝаҙҹаҙҝаҙӘаөҶаҙҹаҙҫаҙӨаҙҝаҙ°аҙҝаҙ•аөҚаҙ•аҙҫаө» аҙ¶аөҚаҙ°аҙҰаөҚаҙ§аҙҝаҙ•аөҚаҙ•аҙЈаҙӮ. аҙ·аөҶаҙҜаөј
snippet.description:
аҙӨаҙҝаҙ°аҙ•аөҚаҙ•аөҮаҙұаҙҝаҙҜ аҙЁаҙ®аөҚаҙ®аөҒаҙҹаөҶ аҙңаөҖаҙөаҙҝаҙӨаҙӨаөҚаҙӨаҙҝаҙЁаҙҝаҙҹаҙҜаҙҝаөҪ аҙөаҙҫаҙ·аҙҝаҙӮаҙ—аөҚ аҙ®аөҶаҙ·аөҖаө» аҙҮаҙЁаөҚаҙЁаөҚ аҙ’аҙҙаҙҝаҙөаҙҫаҙ•аөҚаҙ•аҙҫаҙЁаҙҫаҙ•аҙҝаҙІаөҚаҙІ. аҙӘаҙ•аөҚаҙ·аөҶ аҙ¶аөҚаҙ°аҙҰаөҚаҙ§аҙҝаҙ•аөҚаҙ•аөҮаҙЈаөҚаҙҹ аҙ’аҙ°аөҒ аҙ•аҙҫаҙ°аөҚаҙҜаҙӮ.. аҙӘаҙӨаҙҝаҙөаҙҫаҙҜаҙҝ аҙөаҙҫаҙ·аҙҝаҙӮаҙ—аөҚ аҙ®аөҶаҙ·аөҖаҙЁаҙҝаөҪ аҙ…аҙІаҙ•аөҚаҙ•аҙҝаҙҜ аҙөаҙёаөҚаҙӨаөҚаҙ°аҙҷаөҚаҙҷаөҫ аҙүаҙӘаҙҜаөӢаҙ—аҙҝаҙ•аөҚаҙ•аөҒаҙЁаөҚаҙЁаҙөаөјаҙ•аөҚаҙ•аөҚ аҙҡаҙҝаҙІ аҙ°аөӢаҙ—аҙҷаөҚаҙҷаөҫ аҙӘаҙҝаҙҹаҙҝаҙӘаөҶаҙҹаҙҫаө» аҙёаҙҫаҙ§аөҚаҙҜаҙӨаҙҜаөҒаҙЈаөҚаҙҹаөҚ. аҙҲ аҙ…аҙөаҙёаөҚаҙҘ аҙүаҙЈаөҚаҙҹаҙҫаҙ•аөҒаҙЁаөҚаҙЁаҙӨаөҚ аҙҺаҙҷаөҚаҙҷаҙЁаөҶ ?
0:00 Start
2:20  аҙ°аөӢаҙ—аҙҷаөҚаҙҷаөҫ аҙӘаҙҝаҙҹаҙҝаҙӘаөҶаҙҹаөҒаҙЁаөҚаҙЁаҙӨаөҚ аҙҺаҙҷаөҚаҙҷаҙЁаөҶ?
6:00 аҙ…аҙҹаҙҝаҙөаҙёаөҚаҙӨаөҚаҙ°аҙӮ аҙӘаҙ•аҙ°аөҚвҖҚаҙҡаөҚаҙҡаҙөаөҚаҙҜаҙҫаҙҰаҙҝаҙ•аөҚаҙ•аөҚ аҙ•аҙҫаҙ°аҙЈаҙ®аҙҫаҙ•аөҒаҙЁаөҚаҙЁаҙӨаөҚ аҙҺаҙҷаөҚаҙҷаҙЁаөҶ ?
7:37 аҙөаҙҫаҙ·аҙҝаҙӮаҙ—аөҚ аҙ®аөҶаҙ·аөҖаҙЁаөҚвҖҚ аҙҺаҙҷаөҚаҙҷаҙЁаөҶ  аҙ…аҙЈаөҒаҙөаҙҝаҙ®аөҒаҙ•аөҚаҙӨаҙ®аҙҫаҙ•аөҚаҙ•аҙҫаҙӮ ?

 аҙҲ аҙ°аөӢаҙ—аҙҷаөҚаҙҷаҙіаөҶ аҙҺаҙҷаөҚаҙҷаҙЁаөҶ аҙӨаҙҹаҙҜаҙҫаө» аҙёаҙҫаҙ§аҙҝаҙ•аөҚаҙ•аөҒаҙӮ ? аҙөаҙіаҙ°аөҶ аҙӘаөҚаҙ°аҙ§аҙҫаҙЁаҙӘаөҚаҙӘаөҶаҙҹаөҚаҙҹ аҙҮаө»аҙ«аөјаҙ®аөҮаҙ·аө». аҙЁаҙҝаҙҷаөҚаҙҷаөҫ аҙӘаөҠаҙӨаөҒаҙёаҙ®аөӮаҙ№аҙӨаөҚаҙӨаҙҝаҙЁаөҚаҙұаөҶ аҙ…аҙұаҙҝаҙөаҙҝаҙІаөҮаҙ•аөҚаҙ•аҙҫаҙҜаҙҝ аҙ·аөҶаҙҜаөј аҙҡаөҶаҙҜаөҚаҙҜаөҒаҙ•.. аҙ’аҙ°аөҒаҙӘаҙҫаҙҹаөҒ аҙ•аөҒаҙҹаөҒаҙӮаҙ¬аҙҷаөҚаҙҷаөҫаҙ•аөҚаҙ•аөҚ аҙҲ аҙ…аҙұаҙҝаҙөаөҚ аҙүаҙӘаҙ•аҙҫаҙ°аҙӘаөҚаҙӘаөҶаҙҹаөҒаҙӮ. 

For Appointments  Please Call 90 6161 5959

snippet.title: аӨӨаӨҝаӨІ аӨҡаҘҢаӨҘ аӨөаҘҚаӨ°аӨӨ аӨ•аӨҘаӨҫ | Til Chauth Vrat Katha | Sankat chaturthi | Sankashti Chaturthi Ki katha
snippet.description:
This Video shows two stories of Til Chauth vrat or . Til Chauth is also called Sankashti Chaturthi, Sakat Chauth, Sankat Chaturthi. Til Chauth vrat is observed on the Chaturthi of Krishna Paksha of Magh maas. Til Kutte is offered to Shri Ganesh Ji and Chauth Mata on the day of sakat choth.   Tilakuta is made by crushing sesame and jaggery together.
Women observe this fast for the longevity and success of their husband and son. This fast destroys all kinds of crises and provides happiness and prosperity.
On this day of Sakat chauth, women keep a fast for the whole day and worship Lord Ganesha and Chauth Mata in the evening. On observing the moon at night, the fast is completed. Let's watch the  Til Chauth Vrat Katha and pray to lord ganesh and sakata mata.

аӨӨаӨҝаӨІ аӨҡаҘҢаӨҘ аӨөаҘҚаӨ°аӨӨ аӨ•аӨҘаӨҫ | Til Chauth Vrat Katha | Sankat Chauth Katha
аӨҶаӨң аӨ®аҘҲаӨӮ аӨҶаӨӘ аӨёаӨӯаҘҖ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨёаӨ®аӨ•аҘҚаӨ· аӨӨаӨҝаӨІ аӨҡаҘҢаӨҘ аӨ…аӨҘаӨөаӨҫ  аӨёаӨӮаӨ•аӨҹ аӨҡаҘҢаӨҘ аӨөаҘҚаӨ°аӨӨ аӨ•аҘҖ  аӨҰаҘӢ аӨ•аӨҘаӨҫаӨҸаӨӮ  аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨёаҘҚаӨӨаҘҒаӨӨ аӨ•аӨ° аӨ°аӨ№аҘҖ аӨ№аҘӮаӨӮаҘӨ аӨӨаӨҝаӨІ аӨҡаҘҢаӨҘ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨөаҘҚаӨ°аӨӨ аӨ®аӨҫаӨҳ аӨ®аӨҫаӨё аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ•аҘғаӨ·аҘҚаӨЈ аӨӘаӨ•аҘҚаӨ· аӨ•аҘҖ аӨҡаӨӨаҘҒаӨ°аҘҚаӨҘаҘҖ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ•аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨңаӨҫаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ| аӨҮаӨё аӨҰаӨҝаӨЁ аӨ¶аҘҚаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ—аӨЈаҘҮаӨ¶ аӨңаҘҖ аӨө аӨҡаҘҢаӨҘ аӨ®аӨҫаӨӨаӨҫ  аӨ•аҘӢ аӨӨаӨҝаӨІ аӨ•аҘҒаӨҹаҘҚаӨҹаҘҮ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨӯаҘӢаӨ— аӨІаӨ—аӨҫаӨҜаӨҫ аӨңаӨҫаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ |  аӨӨаӨҝаӨІаӨ•аҘҒаӨҹаӨҫ  аӨӨаӨҝаӨІ аӨ”аӨ° аӨ—аҘҒаӨЎаӨј аӨ•аҘӢ  аӨҸаӨ• аӨёаӨҫаӨҘ аӨ•аҘӮаӨҹаӨ•аӨ° аӨ¬аӨЁаӨҫаӨҜаӨҫ аӨңаӨҫаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ
аӨҜаӨ№ аӨөаҘҚаӨ°аӨӨ аӨёаҘҚаӨӨаҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ…аӨӘаӨЁаҘҮ аӨӘаӨӨаӨҝ аӨө аӨӘаҘҒаӨӨаҘҚаӨ° аӨ•аҘҖ аӨҰаҘҖаӨ°аҘҚаӨҳаӨҫаӨҜаҘҒ аӨ”аӨ° аӨёаӨ«аӨІаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨ•аӨ°аӨӨаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ |  аӨҜаӨ№ аӨөаҘҚаӨ°аӨӨ аӨёаӨӯаҘҖ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨ•аӨҫаӨ° аӨ•аҘҮ аӨёаӨӮаӨ•аӨҹаҘӢаӨӮ  аӨ•аӨҫ аӨЁаӨҫаӨ¶ аӨ•аӨ°аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨ”аӨ° аӨёаҘҒаӨ– аӨёаӨ®аҘғаӨҰаҘҚаӨ§аӨҝ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨҰаӨҫаӨЁ аӨ•аӨ°аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ
аӨҮаӨё аӨҰаӨҝаӨЁ аӨёаҘҚаӨӨаҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ  аӨӘаҘӮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨҰаӨҝаӨЁ аӨөаҘҚаӨ°аӨӨ аӨ°аӨ– аӨ•аӨ° аӨ¶аӨҫаӨ® аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ—аӨЈаҘҮаӨ¶ аӨңаҘҖ аӨө аӨҡаҘҢаӨҘ аӨ®аӨҫаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨӘаҘӮаӨңаӨЁ  аӨӘаҘӮаӨңаӨЁ  аӨ•аӨ°аӨӨаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮаҘӨ  аӨ°аӨҫаӨӨ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨҡаӨЁаҘҚаӨҰаҘҚаӨ°аӨ®аӨҫ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ…аӨ°аҘҚаӨ§аҘҚаӨҜ  аӨҰаҘҮаӨЁаҘҮ  аӨӘаӨ° аӨөаҘҚаӨ°аӨӨ аӨӘаҘӮаӨ°аҘҚаӨЈ аӨ№аҘӢ аӨңаӨҫаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ аӨҶаӨҮаӨҸ аӨ¶аҘҒаӨ°аҘӮ аӨ•аӨ°аӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ аӨӨаӨҝаӨІ аӨҡаҘҢаӨҘ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨӘаӨ№аӨІаҘҖ аӨ•аӨҘаӨҫ...

#tilchauthvratkatha  #sankatChauthVratKatha #ganesh  #chauthmata

аӨҶаӨң аӨ®аҘҲаӨӮ аӨҶаӨӘ аӨёаӨӯаҘҖ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨёаӨ®аӨ•аҘҚаӨ· аӨӨаӨҝаӨІ аӨҡаҘҢаӨҘ аӨ…аӨҘаӨөаӨҫ  аӨёаӨӮаӨ•аӨҹ аӨҡаҘҢаӨҘ аӨөаҘҚаӨ°аӨӨ аӨ•аҘҖ  аӨҰаҘӢ аӨ•аӨҘаӨҫаӨҸаӨӮ  аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨёаҘҚаӨӨаҘҒаӨӨ аӨ•аӨ° аӨ°аӨ№аҘҖ аӨ№аҘӮаӨӮаҘӨ аӨӨаӨҝаӨІ аӨҡаҘҢаӨҘ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨөаҘҚаӨ°аӨӨ аӨ®аӨҫаӨҳ аӨ®аӨҫаӨё аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ•аҘғаӨ·аҘҚаӨЈ аӨӘаӨ•аҘҚаӨ· аӨ•аҘҖ аӨҡаӨӨаҘҒаӨ°аҘҚаӨҘаҘҖ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ•аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨңаӨҫаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ| аӨҮаӨё аӨҰаӨҝаӨЁ аӨ¶аҘҚаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ—аӨЈаҘҮаӨ¶ аӨңаҘҖ аӨө аӨҡаҘҢаӨҘ аӨ®аӨҫаӨӨаӨҫ  аӨ•аҘӢ аӨӨаӨҝаӨІ аӨ•аҘҒаӨҹаҘҚаӨҹаҘҮ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨӯаҘӢаӨ— аӨІаӨ—аӨҫаӨҜаӨҫ аӨңаӨҫаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ |  аӨӨаӨҝаӨІаӨ•аҘҒаӨҹаӨҫ  аӨӨаӨҝаӨІ аӨ”аӨ° аӨ—аҘҒаӨЎаӨј аӨ•аҘӢ  аӨҸаӨ• аӨёаӨҫаӨҘ аӨ•аҘӮаӨҹаӨ•аӨ° аӨ¬аӨЁаӨҫаӨҜаӨҫ аӨңаӨҫаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ
аӨҜаӨ№ аӨөаҘҚаӨ°аӨӨ аӨёаҘҚаӨӨаҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ…аӨӘаӨЁаҘҮ аӨӘаӨӨаӨҝ аӨө аӨӘаҘҒаӨӨаҘҚаӨ° аӨ•аҘҖ аӨҰаҘҖаӨ°аҘҚаӨҳаӨҫаӨҜаҘҒ аӨ”аӨ° аӨёаӨ«аӨІаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨ•аӨ°аӨӨаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ |  аӨҜаӨ№ аӨөаҘҚаӨ°аӨӨ аӨёаӨӯаҘҖ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨ•аӨҫаӨ° аӨ•аҘҮ аӨёаӨӮаӨ•аӨҹаҘӢаӨӮ  аӨ•аӨҫ аӨЁаӨҫаӨ¶ аӨ•аӨ°аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨ”аӨ° аӨёаҘҒаӨ– аӨёаӨ®аҘғаӨҰаҘҚаӨ§аӨҝ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨҰаӨҫаӨЁ аӨ•аӨ°аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ
аӨҮаӨё аӨҰаӨҝаӨЁ аӨёаҘҚаӨӨаҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ  аӨӘаҘӮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨҰаӨҝаӨЁ аӨөаҘҚаӨ°аӨӨ аӨ°аӨ– аӨ•аӨ° аӨ¶аӨҫаӨ® аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ—аӨЈаҘҮаӨ¶ аӨңаҘҖ аӨө аӨҡаҘҢаӨҘ аӨ®аӨҫаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨӘаҘӮаӨңаӨЁ  аӨӘаҘӮаӨңаӨЁ  аӨ•аӨ°аӨӨаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮаҘӨ  аӨ°аӨҫаӨӨ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨҡаӨЁаҘҚаӨҰаҘҚаӨ°аӨ®аӨҫ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ…аӨ°аҘҚаӨ§аҘҚаӨҜ  аӨҰаҘҮаӨЁаҘҮ  аӨӘаӨ° аӨөаҘҚаӨ°аӨӨ аӨӘаҘӮаӨ°аҘҚаӨЈ аӨ№аҘӢ аӨңаӨҫаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ аӨҶаӨҮаӨҸ аӨ¶аҘҒаӨ°аҘӮ аӨ•аӨ°аӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ аӨӨаӨҝаӨІ аӨҡаҘҢаӨҘ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨӘаӨ№аӨІаҘҖ аӨ•аӨҘаӨҫ...

snippet.description:
Hello everyone! Here I am with yet another video for you all i.e. "What's in my bag?!".
Everyone asks me about things I carry in my bag all the time. So finally, here I am disclosing all the stuff my bag carries for me when I am out.

snippet.title: Highlights - ATK Mohun Bagan 3-2 Kerala Blasters - Match 78 | Hero ISL 2020-21
snippet.description:
ATK Mohun Bagan pulled off a stunning comeback, beating Kerala Blasters 3-2 at the Fatorda Stadium. Gary Hooper's first-half screamer and Costa Nhamoinesu 51st minute goal put Kibu Vicuna's side in firm control of the contest. But ATKMB's new signing Marcelinho, reignited hope with a debut goal and Roy Krishna's brace helped complete a comeback and seal a famous win for Antonio Lopez Habas' side!

snippet.title: EMIWAY - WHAT CAN I DO (PROD. BY FLAMBOY) (OFFICIAL MUSIC VIDEO)
snippet.description:
Lyrics given below 

Artist /lyrics : Emiway Bantai 
Prod/ music : Flamboy 
Mix &master : Emiway Bantai
Director / dop : Canfuse
Associate director : Sankalp Vaid 
EDIT : Riddhi Hadkar
COLOURIST : Canfuse
Production- Bantai Studio 
Production management- Minta ,Sumit singh
Line production- Sankalp Vaid 
Production Asst. - Akash Gurram, Mohan Shetty 
Makeup- Shyam Shrilal Vishwakarma 
BTS  : Akash Singh,  Shubham Bandhal, & Sumit Fanse

Streaming on All Audio Platforms :

Apple Music вҖ“ https://music.apple.com/in/album/what-can-i-do-single/1550885290 
Spotify вҖ“ https://open.spotify.com/track/3iAe6EeL2sDubF42mCadsF 
Amazon Music вҖ“ https://music.amazon.in/albums/B08V59VMR9?marketplaceId=A21TJRUUN4KGV&musicTerritory=IN&trackAsin=B08V4B4T32 
YouTube Music вҖ“ https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=XG73UQhA9RQ&feature=share 
Resso - https://m.resso.app/ZSEBBb4B/ 
Hungama вҖ“ https://www.hungama.com/song/what-can-i-do/61789691/ 
JioSaavn вҖ“ https://www.jiosaavn.com/song/what-can-i-do/L14nHBJUbR4 
Wynk вҖ“ https://wynk.in/music/song/bhula-dunga/bl_A10320WT037785766X 
Gaana вҖ“ https://gaana.com/album/what-can-i-do-hindi

Lyrics
(Hook)
Boht sara hype hai apne pass bro 
God bless uh hope u all grow 
Patte chupake rakhela 
Nai karra show 
Nai bolna bro 
Agar tere woh 
dil se na ho 
Vibe nahi match kre 
Milte nai bro 
Jagah full pakdele 
Hilte nai bro 
Sab kare copy mera tareeka 
What can i do 

What can i do (x2)
What can i do yoo
What can i fo 
i got the views 
They wanna walk in my shoes 
What can i do (x3)
What can i do 
I got the moves 
They wanna walk in my shoes


Chapne do bhai 
Style mera dhapne do bhai 
Fame ke bhook mei 
Karrele nakli ladai 
Rapper log banrele bhai 
Kya toh sikhaye tumlogo 
Ke gane se 
Ek hi baat batarele ye zamanse 
Farak nai padta mujhe abhi kisi ke jane se 
Dil ko sambhal warna toot jayega kisiko
Chahnese 
Boht kuch seekhaya mei logo ko gaane 
Bandhiya bhi toh marti apne gaane pe 
Aisehich thodi na alag wajab 
Apan ayele cash deke gaadi pe 
Selected public invited hai party mei 
Dikhna tha smarty toh kam ki daadi mei 
Haters log latakrele mere Naadi mei 
Inkyamaakya apanich hard hai be 

(Hook)

Itne views lana lala tere bas ka nai 
Seedha shot dete bala 
Khota bajta nai 
Sadak ki boli lekin daam apna 
Sasta nai 
Nakli swag video mei lala jachta nai 
Karne kar par 
asal wala feel la 
Emiway fan base 
Dekhe beta sabka bheja hilla 
Diss gane fekde toh 
Chaddi bhi gilla 
Naklipan video mei aur koi ni milla ?

Ye bhai bante video mei 
Apan kulfa karate aise logo ko audio mei 
Jis jis se bhidjate us us ko pel dete 
Baki jo firak mei baithele unlog ko
Tel dete bolte chal masal 
Apan hai asal 
Logo ko pasand 
Har ek gana apna 
Rehta jashan 
Bakiyo ki baatcheet  
 La*da aur lassan 
Meko ni pasand 
Inlog ki soch 
Apni toh public hai dost
Vip meeting no easy approach 
Kaise kiya mei 
Ab baithke tu soch 
Mei mere dost
kamare fatte 
Blessing hai life 
Machare fatte
Nai chaiye advice 

Ua bitch is my ex bro
M receiving text bro 
Its my turn to flex bro 
I own what i manifest bro 
Soo soo many eyes on me 
blessed bro
I Got no time to waste bro 
If uh wanna move 
There are soo many ways bro
M livin my life at the best bro 
Lessgooo рҹ”Ҙ
(Hook)

#emiway #whatcanido #bantai

snippet.title: I Spent 100 Hours Customizing The World's Largest PS5 ($70,000)
snippet.description:
I can't believe we spent 100 hours customizing the world's largest Playstation 5 and gave PS5's away to subscribers lol

Hope you enjoyed! Subscribe right now and you'll be a part of the giveaways! Thanks for watching :)

If you're not yet subscribed, I promise you won't regret subscribing! If you're already subscribed, I love you! вқӨпёҸ
Subscribe and you might be picked to be in my next video! It's free and it would genuinely make me super happy if you subscribed! рҹҘә

Subscribe to all our channels!
ZHC Crafts: @ZHC Crafts 
ZHC Shorts: @ZHC Shorts 
MsMunchie: @MsMunchie 

This PS5 is 10 feet tall (3 meters) weighs 500 pounds (227 kilograms) and cost me $70,000 in total! This playstation 5 is insane! We spent over 4 months putting together this video for you!

Follow my socials too!
Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/zhc
Twitter - https://twitter.com/zhc_yt
Facebook - https://www.facebook.com/ZHC/

If you scrolled till the end... i luv u рҹҘәвқӨпёҸ

snippet.title: Chakkappazham | Flowers | Ep#121
snippet.description:
аҙөаҙЁаҙҝаҙӨаҙҫ аҙёаҙӮаҙ°аҙӮаҙӯаҙ•аөӘаҙ•аөҚаҙ•аөҚ аҙҮаҙӨаҙҫ аҙёаөҚаҙөаҙЁаөҚаҙӨаҙӮ аҙЁаҙҫаҙҹаөҚаҙҹаҙҝаөҪ аҙёаөҚаҙөаҙЁаөҚаҙӨаҙӮ аҙ¬аҙҝаҙёаҙҝаҙЁаҙёаөҚ... 
аҙҮаҙЁаөҚаҙӨаөҚаҙҜаҙҜаҙҝаөҪ  аҙ…аҙӨаҙҝаҙөаөҮаҙ—аҙӮ аҙөаҙіаҙ°аөҒаҙЁаөҚаҙЁ аҙҺаҙЎаөҚаҙҜаөҒаҙҹаөҶаҙ•аөҚ аҙҶаҙӘаөҚаҙӘаөҚ  аҙҶаҙҜ 90+ My Tution App  аҙЁаөҚаҙұаөҶ аҙ®аҙҝаҙЁаҙҝ аҙЎаөҖаҙІаөј аҙ№аҙ¬аөҚаҙ¬аөҚ аҙҮаҙӘаөҚаҙӘаөӢаөҫ  аҙөаҙЁаҙҝаҙӨаҙ•аөҫаҙ•аөҚаҙ•аҙҫаҙҜаҙҝ аҙЁаөҪаҙ•аөҒаҙЁаөҚаҙЁаөҒ.. 
https://mytuitionapp.com/
аҙҺаҙЁаөҚаҙЁ аҙөаөҶаҙ¬аөҚаҙёаөҲаҙұаөҚаҙұаҙҝаөҪ
аҙҮаҙӘаөҚаҙӘаөӢаөҫ аҙӨаҙЁаөҚаҙЁаөҶ Register аҙҡаөҶаҙҜаөҚаҙҜаөӮ...

аҙёаҙӨаөҚаҙҜаҙёаҙЁаөҚаҙ§аҙ®аҙҫаҙҜ аҙҶаҙІаөӢаҙҡаҙЁаҙ•аҙіаҙҝаҙІаөӮаҙҹаөҶ аҙёаҙЁаөҚаҙӨаөӢаҙ·аҙ•аҙ°аҙ®аҙҫаҙҜ аҙ¬аҙЁаөҚаҙ§аҙҷаөҚаҙҷаҙіаөҠаҙ°аөҒаҙ•аөҚаҙ•аҙҝаҙҜ 36 аҙөаөјаҙ·аҙҷаөҚаҙҷаөҫ. аҙ®аҙҫаҙІаҙҜаөӢаҙ—аҙӮ аҙ®аҙҫаҙҹаөҚаҙ°аҙҝаҙ®аөҠаҙЈаҙҝ

snippet.title: аҙЁаҙҫаҙіаөҶ аҙ®аөҒаҙӨаөҪ аҙөаҙҫаҙ№аҙЁаҙҷаөҚаҙҷаөҫ аҙӘаҙҝаҙҹаҙҝаҙҡаөҚаҙҡаөҶаҙҹаөҒаҙ•аөҚаҙ•аөҒаҙӮ аҙІаөҲаҙёаө»аҙёаөҚ аҙұаҙҰаөҚаҙҰаҙҫаҙ•аөҚаҙ•аөҒаҙӮ аҙӘаөҚаҙ°аҙ§аҙҫаҙЁ аҙ…аҙұаҙҝаҙҜаҙҝаҙӘаөҚаҙӘаөҚ
snippet.description:
аҙЁаҙҫаҙіаөҶ аҙ®аөҒаҙӨаөҪ аҙөаҙҫаҙ№аҙЁаҙҷаөҚаҙҷаөҫ аҙӘаҙҝаҙҹаҙҝаҙҡаөҚаҙҡаөҶаҙҹаөҒаҙ•аөҚаҙ•аөҒаҙӮ аҙІаөҲаҙёаө»аҙёаөҚ аҙұаҙҰаөҚаҙҰаҙҫаҙ•аөҚаҙ•аөҒаҙӮ аҙӘаөҚаҙ°аҙ§аҙҫаҙЁ аҙ…аҙұаҙҝаҙҜаҙҝаҙӘаөҚаҙӘаөҚ 
рқҗғрқҗўрқҗ¬рқҗңрқҗҘрқҗҡрқҗўрқҗҰрқҗһрқҗ«рҹ“ўрҹ“ўрҹ“ў
аҙҲ аҙҡаҙҫаҙЁаҙІаҙҝаҙІаөӮаҙҹаөҶ аҙһаҙҷаөҚаҙҷаөҫВ  аҙӘаөҚаҙ°аҙёаҙҝаҙҰаөҚаҙ§аөҖаҙ•аҙ°аҙҝаҙ•аөҚаҙ•аөҒаҙЁаөҚаҙЁ аҙөаөҖаҙЎаҙҝаҙҜаөӢаҙ•аҙіаҙҝаөҪ аҙ’аҙ°аөҒаҙӨаҙ°аҙӨаөҚаҙӨаҙҝаҙІаөҒаҙ®аөҒаҙіаөҚаҙі аҙ°аҙҫаҙ·аөҚаҙҹаөҚаҙ°аөҖаҙҜ,аҙёаҙҫаҙ®аөҒаҙҰаҙҫаҙҜаҙҝаҙ•, аҙ®аҙӨаҙӘаҙ°аҙ®аҙҫаҙҜВ  аҙ’аҙ°аөҒ аҙөаөҮаөјаҙӨаҙҝаҙ°аҙҝаҙөаөҒаҙ®аҙҝаҙІаөҚаҙІ. аҙ—аҙөаөәаҙ®аөҶаҙЁаөҚаҙұаөҚ аҙёаөҚаҙ•аөҖаҙ®аөҒаҙ•аөҫ аҙҸаҙӨаөҚ аҙЁаҙҝаҙ®аҙҝаҙ·аҙөаөҒаҙӮ аҙҺаҙӘаөҚаҙӘаөӢаөҫ аҙөаөҮаҙЈаҙ®аөҶаҙҷаөҚаҙ•аҙҝаҙІаөҒаҙӮ аҙ®аҙҫаҙұаөҚаҙұаҙӮ аҙёаҙӮаҙӯаҙөаҙҝаҙ•аөҚаҙ•аҙҫаҙӮ . аҙҶаҙҜаҙӨаҙҝаҙЁаҙҫаөҪ аҙһаҙҷаөҚаҙҷаөҫ аҙӘаөҚаҙ°аҙёаҙҝаҙҰаөҚаҙ§аөҖаҙ•аҙ°аҙҝаҙ•аөҚаҙ•аөҒаҙЁаөҚаҙЁ аҙӘаөҒаҙӨаҙҝаҙҜ аҙөаөҖаҙЎаҙҝаҙҜаөӢ аҙ…аҙӘаөҚвҖҢаҙЎаөҮаҙ·аҙЁаөҒаҙ•аөҫ аҙ•аҙҫаҙЈаөҒаҙөаҙҫаө» аҙ¶аөҚаҙ°аҙ®аҙҝаҙ•аөҚаҙ•аөҒаҙ•рҹ‘Қ.

#chrishalmedia

аҙҲ аҙҡаҙҫаҙЁаҙІаҙҝаҙІаөӮаҙҹаөҶ аҙһаҙҷаөҚаҙҷаөҫВ  аҙӘаөҚаҙ°аҙёаҙҝаҙҰаөҚаҙ§аөҖаҙ•аҙ°аҙҝаҙ•аөҚаҙ•аөҒаҙЁаөҚаҙЁ аҙөаөҖаҙЎаҙҝаҙҜаөӢаҙ•аҙіаҙҝаөҪ аҙ’аҙ°аөҒаҙӨаҙ°аҙӨаөҚаҙӨаҙҝаҙІаөҒаҙ®аөҒаҙіаөҚаҙі аҙ°аҙҫаҙ·аөҚаҙҹаөҚаҙ°аөҖаҙҜ,аҙёаҙҫаҙ®аөҒаҙҰаҙҫаҙҜаҙҝаҙ•, аҙ®аҙӨаҙӘаҙ°аҙ®аҙҫаҙҜВ  аҙ’аҙ°аөҒ аҙөаөҮаөјаҙӨаҙҝаҙ°аҙҝаҙөаөҒаҙ®аҙҝаҙІаөҚаҙІ. аҙ—аҙөаөәаҙ®аөҶаҙЁаөҚаҙұаөҚ аҙёаөҚаҙ•аөҖаҙ®аөҒаҙ•аөҫ аҙҸаҙӨаөҚ аҙЁаҙҝаҙ®аҙҝаҙ·аҙөаөҒаҙӮ аҙҺаҙӘаөҚаҙӘаөӢаөҫ аҙөаөҮаҙЈаҙ®аөҶаҙҷаөҚаҙ•аҙҝаҙІаөҒаҙӮ аҙ®аҙҫаҙұаөҚаҙұаҙӮ аҙёаҙӮаҙӯаҙөаҙҝаҙ•аөҚаҙ•аҙҫаҙӮ . аҙҶаҙҜаҙӨаҙҝаҙЁаҙҫаөҪ аҙһаҙҷаөҚаҙҷаөҫ аҙӘаөҚаҙ°аҙёаҙҝаҙҰаөҚаҙ§аөҖаҙ•аҙ°аҙҝаҙ•аөҚаҙ•аөҒаҙЁаөҚаҙЁ аҙӘаөҒаҙӨаҙҝаҙҜ аҙөаөҖаҙЎаҙҝаҙҜаөӢ аҙ…аҙӘаөҚвҖҢаҙЎаөҮаҙ·аҙЁаөҒаҙ•аөҫ аҙ•аҙҫаҙЈаөҒаҙөаҙҫаө» аҙ¶аөҚаҙ°аҙ®аҙҝаҙ•аөҚаҙ•аөҒаҙ•рҹ‘Қ.

snippet.title: Budget 2021 HIGHLIGHTS - The key Take Away -  CNN News18
snippet.description:
Watch the key highlights of Budget 2021 presented by the FM Nirmala Sitharaman.

Budget 2021 Highlights:

Contingency Fund of India to be enhanced to Rs 30,000 cr.

Propose to discontinue loans to FCI. Have provided for support in budget.

15th Finance Commission reconfirming share of States at 41%.

National Research Foundation to be set up at Rs. 50,000 crores to strengthen the research ecosystem

Union Budget 2021 allows NRIs to operate OPCs in India

#CNNNews18 #Budget2021 #BudgetWithNews18 

Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman presents the Union Budget 2021 in Parliament. Sitharaman has raised hopes, going into the Budget event, by stating that it will "be a Budget like never before."

Watch all the latest updates on Union Budget 2021 LIVE: FM Nirmala Sitharaman to present budget at 11 AM.

snippet.title: New Tata Safari 2021 with 6/7 Seat configuration | Diesel Manual & Automatic | Review by Baiju Nair
snippet.description:
All new Tata Safari 2021 with 6/7 Seat configuration | Diesel Manual & Automatic | Malayalam Review by Baiju N Nair

аҙӨаөҒаҙҹаҙ•аөҚаҙ•аҙӨаөҚаҙӨаҙҝаөҪ аҙӘаҙұаҙһаөҚаҙһ аҙёаөҚаҙӘаөҶаҙҜаөј аҙӘаҙҫаөјаҙҹаөҚаҙёаөҒаҙ•аөҫ аҙ“аөәаҙІаөҲаө» аҙөаҙҫаҙҷаөҚаҙҷаҙҫаҙөаөҒаҙЁаөҚаҙЁ аҙ•аҙ®аөҚаҙӘаҙЁаҙҝаҙҜаөҒаҙҹаөҶ аҙөаҙҝаҙ¶аҙҰ аҙөаҙҝаҙөаҙ°аҙҷаөҚаҙҷаөҫ аҙҮаҙӨаҙҫ:
 https://boodmo.com
аҙҶаҙӘаөҚаҙӘаҙҝаөҫ аҙёаөҚаҙұаөҚаҙұаөӢаөј: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/boodmo/id1154010647
аҙ—аөӮаҙ—аҙҝаөҫ аҙӘаөҚаҙіаөҮаҙёаөҚаҙұаөҚаҙұаөӢаөј: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.opsway.boodmo
 
аҙҹаҙҫаҙұаөҚаҙұ аҙ№аҙҫаҙ°аҙҝаҙҜаҙұаҙҝаҙЁаөҚаҙұаөҶ 6-7 аҙёаөҖаҙұаөҚаҙұаөј аҙ®аөӢаҙЎаөҪ аҙёаҙ«аҙҫаҙ°аҙҝ аҙҺаҙЁаөҚаҙЁ аҙӘаөҮаҙ°аҙҝаөҪ аҙҺаҙӨаөҚаҙӨаөҒаҙ•аҙҜаҙҫаҙЈаөҚ.аҙӘаөҮаҙ°аөҚ аҙ…аҙҷаөҚаҙҷаҙЁаөҶаҙҜаҙҫаҙЈаөҶаҙҷаөҚаҙ•аҙҝаҙІаөҒаҙӮ аҙӘаҙҙаҙҜ аҙёаҙ«аҙҫаҙ°аҙҝаҙҜаөҒаҙ®аҙҫаҙҜаҙҝ аҙӘаөҒаҙІаҙ¬аҙЁаөҚаҙ§аҙӮ аҙӘаөӢаҙІаөҒаҙ®аҙҝаҙІаөҚаҙІ аҙӘаөҒаҙӨаҙҝаҙҜаҙӨаҙҝаҙЁаөҚ.аҙ№аҙҫаҙ°аҙҝаҙҜаҙұаҙҝаөҪ 3 аҙЁаҙҝаҙ° аҙёаөҖаҙұаөҚаҙұаөҒаҙ•аөҫ аҙөаҙЁаөҚаҙЁаөҶаҙЁаөҚаҙЁаөҒ аҙ®аҙҫаҙӨаөҚаҙ°аҙӮ.

Follow me on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/baijunnairofficial
Instagram:www.instagram.com/baijunnairВ 
Email:baijunnair@gmail.com В 
аҙөаҙҫаөјаҙӨаөҚаҙӨаҙ•аөҫаҙ•аөҚаҙ•аөҒаҙӮ аҙҹаөҶаҙёаөҚаҙұаөҚаҙұаөҚ аҙЎаөҚаҙ°аөҲаҙөаөҚ аҙұаҙҝаҙӘаөҚаҙӘаөӢаөјаҙҹаөҚаҙҹаөҒаҙ•аөҫаҙ•аөҚаҙ•аөҒаҙ®аҙҫаҙҜаҙҝ аҙһаҙҷаөҚаҙҷаҙіаөҒаҙҹаөҶ аҙөаөҶаҙ¬аөҚвҖҢаҙёаөҲаҙұаөҚаҙұаөҚ аҙёаҙЁаөҚаҙҰаөјаҙ¶аҙҝаҙ•аөҚаҙ•аҙҫаҙӮ: http://www.smartdrivemag.comВ

In a bid to save an 8-year-old girl from becoming the victim of Sati, Anirudh marries a curious and tyrant girl Bondita. At a time when women education was considered sinful, Anirudh educates Bondita and makes her the first вҖңBarrister BabuвҖқ of their region. Will their imperfect marriage turn into a successful relationship? Will Anirudh succeed in his mission to gain independence for the women in his country?

snippet.title: Shakti | аӨ¶аӨ•аҘҚаӨӨаӨҝ | Episode 1164 & 1165 | Recap
snippet.description:
Heer tries her best to carry out her responsibilities in Biji's house and take care of the baby. However, Heer's truth about earning money by making deity figurines is out to Biji's family. Will Heer be forgiven or punished?

#ColorsTV #Shakti

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

To go to the playlist please click: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLcC6hSpO26KvW8epq68trmgmuFgW1dWBY

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

snippet.title: 23 SMART LIFE HACKS FOR EVERY OCCASION
snippet.description:
Ways to make your life easier with these fantastic hacks. 

As we go through life, we come across little problems that seem unsolvable. But today, weвҖҷre going to show you some fun tricks you can try that will help save you time and hassle. Like when you have to sign a bunch of documents all at once. One way to fix that is to tape some pens on a piece of paper (Somewhat diagonally) and then use them to write. Now letвҖҷs head to the kitchen, where you need to make perfectly round crepes for your guests. You donвҖҷt need to buy an expensive crepe tool that flattens them out and turns them into a perfect circle вҖ” you just need a chopstick or a skewer instead. You break it in the middle, create a 90-degree angle, and voila. Did you know you can use an old highlighter to paint or write stuff down on your tablet? Watch the video to see how to do it. 

Timestamps: 
1:04 вҖ” Perfectly round crepes
2:02 вҖ” No cake plates? Try this hack 
3:09 вҖ” Avoid staining your shirt collar with this trick 
5:08 вҖ” DIY fake nose ring 
6:16 вҖ” A way to cut package tape 
8:12 вҖ” DIY compass using three pencils

This video is made for entertainment purposes. We do not make any warranties about the completeness, safety and reliability. Any action you take upon the information on this video is strictly at your own risk, and we will not be liable for any damages or losses. It is the viewer's responsibility to use judgment, care and precautions if one plans to replicate.

snippet.description:

PM Modi highlighted India's largest covid vaccination programme and said that it was a symbol of the country's self-reliance. Speaking about road safety, PM Modi said that many efforts were being made for road safety at the individual and collective level. He also condemned the violence that took place on 26th January in Delhi.

snippet.title: Ooruku Puthusu Alaparaigal #Nakkalites
snippet.description:
Looking for Your Second Home in a new city? Look no more! рҹҸ 

Discover world class residences for students and working professionals at @stanzaliving 

Pre-book here: https://bit.ly/3nZnfKB
Or call on (080)46007395 to reserve your spot today!
_
Nothing like your average PG or hostel, explore their residences in these areas:

Chennai - OMR (Padur) | Poonamallee | Urapakkam
Coimbatore - Avinashi Road | Gandhipuram | Saravanampatti

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Nakkalites presents you a New video "Ooruku Puthusu Alaparaigal" Annae antha singanallaur bus yenga nae eruku...!!?..рҹӨЈрҹӨЈ

How difficult is it to leave your family and stay to study in another city or state? How does it feel about leaving home for the first time? 

Watch Nakkalites new video вҖңOoruku Puthusu AlaparaigalвҖқ on Nakkalites Youtube channel.

Nakkalites latest is about a boy who does not want to leave his family and home. But, he has to go to  Singanallaur to build his career.

Find out the challenges the boy faces until he reaches Singanallaur in this Tamil comedy.

Also, watch the full video to see the transformation in the boy.
